full_text:
Wang Dun 王惇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Dun (王惇). General of Wu who was executed by Sun Chen. Wang Dun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wang Dun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
